summary: Phase 3 Refactoring testing complete. BonsTab and StatsTab components extracted successfully. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend components render correctly with proper data-testid attributes. Found 1 BUG: Statistiques & Rapport tab is visible to Server role but should be hidden (admin only).

ui_bugs.issue: Statistiques & Rapport tab is visible to Server role but should be hidden. Current condition: `currentUser?.role !== 'manager'` shows tab to admin AND server. Should be: `currentUser?.role === 'admin'` (admin only)

issues: React hydration warning: <span> inside <tbody> and <tr> inside <span> - cosmetic issue, doesn't affect functionality (pre-existing from iteration_32/33)

action_items: FIX BUG: CaissePage.jsx line 3774 - Change `{currentUser?.role !== 'manager' && (` to `{currentUser?.role === 'admin' && (` to hide Statistiques & Rapport tab from Server role
critical_code_review_comments: BonsTab.jsx correctly extracted with ~284 lines, receives 20+ props for state and handlers
StatsTab.jsx correctly extracted with ~285 lines, receives 12 props
CaissePage.jsx reduced from 8318 to 7834 lines (-484 lines)
All new data-testid attributes correctly implemented: bons-tab, stats-tab, stats-month-picker, stats-rapport-date, stats-rapport-refresh, stats-signature-input, bons-filter-date
Role-based filtering for MANAGER GENERAL sub-tab works correctly (canManage = isAdmin || isManager)
BUG: Tab visibility condition for Statistiques & Rapport is incorrect - shows to server when it should be admin-only

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 refactoring (BonsTab, StatsTab extraction) mostly successful. One bug found: Statistiques & Rapport tab visible to Server role when it should be admin-only. Fix is simple: change line 3774 condition. React hydration warnings in tables are cosmetic only (pre-existing).

bug_details.reason: Requirement states 'serveur ne doit pas voir Statistiques & Rapport' but current condition shows tab to both admin AND server
